parameters.name: funkyReportUrl
parameters.description: The base URL for Operator to call.

parameters.name: X-Request-ID
parameters.description: Identifier for log tracing. Please use a mixed alphanumeric string in the form of a UUID, with a length of up to 64 characters.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: If null, all currency's bet list will be returned.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description:
yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.sss
Bet time (Default is PlaceBet time, if SearchTimeType is 1, then Settlement time.)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description:
yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.sss
Bet time (Default is PlaceBet time, if SearchTimeType is 1, then Settlement time.)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description:
Current page. 
Please note that the page parameter starts from 1. If page = 0 is provided, the system will treat it the same as page = 1 and return identical results.
